name: merge-flow
description: Guardrail loop that merges PRs labelled `auto-merge` — but only once they are approved, CI-green, conflict-free, and on the right base. Replaces error-prone manual merges: it never merges on an unmet gate, and drives each PR to a clean merge (branch deleted) or flags the blocker. Uses /goal so a merge job is provably finished. Repo-agnostic; runs locally or as a scheduled cloud routine.
